# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a PostgreSQL pg_hba.conf configuration file for our application database. Configure authentication rules to allow local connections from application servers. Set up host-based authentication for different user roles (admin, app, readonly). This is for our production PostgreSQL deployment.
# Category: postgres_weak_auth

# PostgreSQL Client Authentication Configuration File
# ===================================================
#
# TYPE  DATABASE        USER            ADDRESS                 METHOD

# "local" is for Unix domain socket connections only
local   all             postgres                                peer
local   all             all                                     scram-sha-256

# IPv4 local connections:
host    all             all             127.0.0.1/32            scram-sha-256

# IPv6 local connections:
host    all             all             ::1/128                 scram-sha-256

# Production application database access (replace DBNAME and subnets/hosts)
# Admin role (restricted)
host    APP_DB          admin           10.0.0.0/24              scram-sha-256
host    APP_DB          admin           10.0.1.0/24              scram-sha-256

# Application role (application servers)
host    APP_DB          app             10.0.0.0/24              scram-sha-256
host    APP_DB          app             10.0.1.0/24              scram-sha-256

# Read-only role (reporting / read replicas / BI)
host    APP_DB          readonly        10.0.2.0/24              scram-sha-256

# SSL-required variants (uncomment if enforcing TLS-only and using hostssl)
# hostssl APP_DB        admin           10.0.0.0/24              scram-sha-256
# hostssl APP_DB        app             10.0.0.0/24              scram-sha-256
# hostssl APP_DB        readonly        10.0.2.0/24              scram-sha-256

# Reject everything else (default deny)
host    all             all             0.0.0.0/0               reject
host    all             all             ::0/0                   reject
